nasb.text: which Jeremiah the prophet spoke to all the people of Judah and to all the inhabitants of Jerusalem, saying,

esv.text: which Jeremiah the prophet spoke to all the people of Judah and all the inhabitants of Jerusalem:

cnv.text: 耶利米先知就把這話告訴猶大眾民和耶路撒冷所有的居民，說：

ccb.text: 耶利米先知对犹大人和耶路撒冷的居民说：
